approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies fair value hedge accounting as a hedge model for a recognised asset or liability exposed to a particular risk.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies cash flow hedge accounting as a hedge model for foreign currency risk on recognised items and forecast transactions.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies net investment hedge accounting as a separate model for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
